goal: Swap Franka for Unitree G1 in the existing pick demo: import G1 under a new prim path, remap joint names, pin the bipedal base for a static pick demo.
thoughts: Do NOT find-replace the Franka prim — import G1 under a fresh path and retire the old one. Joint names differ entirely (panda_joint1..7 vs left_shoulder_pitch_joint etc.) so the demo script's joint-target dict must be remapped, not copy-pasted. G1 is bipedal — for a static pick demo either set fix_base=True at import or kinematically pin the pelvis, otherwise the robot falls and the demo dies on stage.
code:
# 1. Confirm shipped G1 asset path
nucleus_browse(path="omniverse://localhost/NVIDIA/Assets/Isaac/5.0/Isaac/Robots/Unitree/G1/")

# 2. Import G1 under a NEW prim path (not a find-replace on /World/Robot)
import_robot(
    urdf_path="omniverse://localhost/NVIDIA/Assets/Isaac/5.0/Isaac/Robots/Unitree/G1/g1.usd",
    dest_path="/World/G1",
    fix_base=True,
    merge_fixed_joints=False
)

# 3. Sanity check the articulation
verify_import(prim_path="/World/G1")

# 4. Diff joint names so the demo script's target dict gets rewritten correctly
list_all_prims(root="/World/G1", schema_filter="PhysicsJoint")
# Old: {'panda_joint1': <q1>, ...}
# New: {'left_shoulder_pitch_joint': <q1>, 'left_elbow_joint': <q2>, ...}

# 5. Patterns for pinning a humanoid base statically
lookup_knowledge(query="Isaac Sim humanoid base pin fixedBase kinematic pelvis static demo G1")

# 6. Retire old Franka prim or park it under /World/_attic so nothing else grabs it.
failure_modes: Find-replace across /World/Robot breaks parented child prims (cameras, TCP frames)
Re-using the Franka joint-target dict verbatim — KeyError at first step
Forgetting fix_base=True on a bipedal — G1 flops over during demo
Importing G1 without verify_import — articulation looks right, zero-mass link crashes on Play
